subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace in Jaipur was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II?
question_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग राजस्थान में बनाया गया है।
B_en: Cenotaph of Maharaja Jai Singh II
explanation_en: The Cenotaph of Maharaja Jai Singh II, also known as the Palace of Winds (Dilli ki Akhara), is a famous palace in Jaipur built by Maharaja Jai Singh II.
explanation_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग की कल्हाणी, अब्दौलन के आधारनेवालों का नाम भी एक महान राजा जैसिंग के बने वर्धन का दिल एक महान राजा जैसिंग के बने वर्धन का दिल एक महान राजा जैसिंग के बने वर्धन के दिल में संकेत है।
B_en: The Jai Mahal, also known as the Umber Fort, is a famous palace.
C_en: The Chandra Mahal, a part of the Amber Fort, is a famous palace.
D_en: The Sheesh Mahal is a part of the Amber Fort and a famous palace.
explanation_en: The Chandra Mahal, a part of the Amber Fort, is a famous palace built by Maharaja Jai Singh II.
explanation_hi: महाराजा जैसिंग के बने अंबर फोट में संकेत है।

subject: Rajasthan
question_en: What is the largest state in Rajasthan in terms of area?

subject: Rajasthan
question_en: What is the largest desert in Rajasthan?
explanation_en: The Thar Desert (थान, Pali) is the largest desert in Rajasthan.

question_en: Which historical place is known as the 'Palace of the Winds'?
